Class OshiMetrics.Builder

java.lang.Object
oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder
Enclosing class:
OshiMetrics
public static final class OshiMetrics.Builder extends Object
Builder for selective metric registration.

By default all metric categories are enabled. Use the enable* methods to disable specific categories.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OshiMetrics
    build()
    Builds the OshiMetrics instance with the configured settings.
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableContainer(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable container metrics (cpu time, memory usage/available).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableCpu(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable CPU metrics (time, frequency, counts).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableDisk(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable disk metrics (io, operations, io_time, limit).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableFileSystem(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable filesystem metrics (usage, utilization, limit).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableGeneral(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable general metrics (uptime, process count).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableMemory(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable memory metrics (usage, limit, utilization).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableNetwork(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable network metrics (io, packets, errors, connections).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enablePaging(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable paging/swap metrics (usage, utilization, operations).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    enableProcess(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable current process metrics (cpu, memory, disk, threads, faults, uptime).

    • enableGeneral

      public OshiMetrics.Builder enableGeneral(boolean enabled)
      Enable or disable general metrics (uptime, process count).
      Parameters:
      enabled - whether to register general metrics
      Returns:
      this builder
